title: ITALY enforcement action against Bressanelli Galli Gelpi Porta & C. S.r.l. (15,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 15,000 on Bressanelli Galli Gelpi Porta & C. S.r.l. The controller had been engaged in direct marketing activities without basing the processing on a sufficient legal basis.
